nasb.text: For rebellion is as the sin of divination, And insubordination is as iniquity and idolatry. Because you have rejected the word of the Lord, He has also rejected you from being king.”

esv.text: For rebellion is as the sin of divination, and presumption is as iniquity and idolatry. Because you have rejected the word of the Lord, he has also rejected you from being king.”

cnv.text: 因為悖逆與行邪術的罪相同， 頑梗與拜虛無偶像一樣， 因為你棄絕了耶和華的話， 耶和華也棄絕了你作王。”

ccb.text: 叛逆不亚于行巫术的罪， 顽固不化无异于拜偶像。 你拒绝耶和华的命令， 祂也拒绝你做王。”
